430.issue_title: Refactor: Rename human_approval in force transition tools

cycles.name: C_ENGINE.1

deliverables.description: Rename transition record properties and force transition methods in PhaseStateEngine

cycles.exit_criteria: Direct calls to PhaseStateEngine transition methods accept human_approval_message, audit trail records human_approval_message, and direct State Engine tests pass successfully.

cycles.name: C_PHASE_TOOLS.2

deliverables.description: Rename parameters in ForcePhaseTransitionInput and ForcePhaseTransitionOutput

cycles.exit_criteria: Phase transition tools expose human_approval_message and all phase tool tests pass.

cycles.name: C_CYCLE_TOOLS.3

deliverables.description: Rename parameters in ForceCycleTransitionInput and ForceCycleTransitionOutput and remove deprecated fallbacks

cycles.exit_criteria: Cycle transition tools expose human_approval_message. A grep search for human_approval in mcp_server/ and tests/ returns 0 results for active code/tests.

cycles.name: C_DOCS.4

deliverables.description: Update active instruction files (AGENTS.md) and reference guides to use human_approval_message

cycles.exit_criteria: All active instruction files and reference documentation are updated. A grep search for human_approval in active docs returns 0 results.
